name: 18d770f1-939b-47f8-8403-d04e86a2d614
displayName: SC-006 – Full Journey: Claims, Benefits, Provider, Then End

scenario.task:
You are John Smith. Ask about one thing at a time and give each answer in a separate turn. Do not add unrelated questions.

Step 1: Ask only to check your claim status. When asked, grant consent and provide Member ID MEM1001, date of birth 1985-04-15, ZIP code 10001, and last four SSN digits 1234.

Step 2: After you receive your claim status, say: "I want to check my benefits." If the assistant asks which benefit, say you want your general benefits or coverage. Accept whatever benefits information it gives you.

Step 3: After you receive your benefits, say: "I want to search for a provider in New York, NY." Accept the list of providers it gives you.

Step 4: After the provider list, the assistant may ask one or more times if there is anything else. Each time it asks, simply say "No, thank you." When the assistant says goodbye, the conversation is complete and you do not need to say anything more.

Do not repeat a request you already completed.
